description: Green Lord Motors, an EV platform development company founded by Kyoto University graduates, recollects the scattered remains of the Tommykaira ZZ and rebirths the ZZ in all its EV glory - no, seriously. You may be wondering what kind of black magic they've achieved to produce such a lightweight EV sports car - there's no magic, the battery is just pitifully small and only lasts for about 75 miles.
creator: Keanny
